name: data-quality-status
title: Data Quality Status
description: A presentation-only data-quality panel that displays app-supplied freshness/completeness/accuracy metrics (rendering "Unknown" when unmeasured), a filterable list of validation checks with keyboard-expandable per-check issue lists, affected-record counts, last-checked time, and a retry-validation control. Status is icon + text, never colour alone. It never claims accuracy without supplied evidence.
